title: Reaping Enchantment
description: Ever wanted to have the Lifesteal enchantment on your axe?
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description:
Ever wanted to have the [Lifesteal Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_lifesteal-enchantment) on your axe?

well, with this enchantment you can!, Reaping is an enchantment that does basically the same thing but on hit you have a 5% chance to get strenght I for 5 seconds, increasing by 5% per level.


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Datapacks!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
